zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl Chaworth於大約1082年出生時，她的父親Patrick de Chaources32歲，母親Mathilda de Hesdin19歲。她和Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1147年1月6日在英國維爾爾布拉登斯托可享年66歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl Chaworth于大约1082年出生时，她的父亲Patrick de Chaources32岁，母亲Mathilda de Hesdin19岁。她和Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1147年1月6日在英国維爾爾布拉登斯托可享年66岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl Chaworth was born about 1082, her father, Patrick de Chaources, was 32 and her mother, Mathilda de Hesdin, was 19. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire. She died on 6 January 1147, in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl Chaworth est née environ 1082, son père, Patrick de Chaources, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mathilda de Hesdin, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire. Elle est décédée le 6 janvier 1147, à Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl Chaworth um 1082 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Patrick de Chaources 32 und ihre Mutter Mathilda de Hesdin 19. Sie hatte mit Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Januar 1147 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl Chaworth è nata il circa 1082, sua padre, Patrick de Chaources, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mathilda de Hesdin, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire. Morì il 6 gennaio 1147, nel Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl Chaworthが約1082年に生まれた時，父Patrick de Chaourcesは32歳，母Mathilda de Hesdinは19歳であった。彼女はWalter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshireとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1147年1月6日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラデンストクで66歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアブラデンストクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl Chaworth(이)가 대략 1082년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Patrick de Chaources(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilda de Hesdin(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1147년 1월 6일 영국 윌츠히르 브라덴스토크에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 브라덴스토크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl Chaworth nasceu aproximadamente 1082, seu pai, Patrick de Chaources, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda de Hesdin, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire. Ela faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1147, em Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl Chaworth родилась около 1082 г., её отцу по имени Patrick de Chaources было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilda de Hesdin, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire. Она умерла 6 января 1147 г. в местности браденсток, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности браденсток, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibyl Chaworth nació aproximadamente 1082, su papá, Patrick de Chaources, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mathilda de Hesdin, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire. Murió el 6 de enero de 1147, en Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
